abilities.description: Gain +1 Bonus Attack at the start of your next turn.Upgraded: You or another unit gains +1 Bonus Attack at the start of their next turn.

translation.ru_description: Получите +1 Бонусную Атаку в начале след. хода.
translation.ru_upgraded_description: Вы или другой юнит получаете +1 Бонусную Атаку в начале след. хода.
translation.en_description: Gain +1 Bonus Attack at the start of your next turn.
translation.en_upgraded_description: You or another unit gains +1 Bonus Attack at the start of their next turn.

abilities.description: Set a bait trap that attracts enemies.Upgraded: Set a bait trap that attracts enemies and inflicts Poison and Slow when eaten.

translation.ru_description: Поставьте приманку, привлекающую врагов.
translation.ru_upgraded_description: Поставьте приманку. При поедании: Яд и Замедление.
translation.en_description: Set a bait trap that attracts enemies.
translation.en_upgraded_description: Set a bait trap that attracts enemies and inflicts Poison and Slow when eaten.

abilities.description: Set a trap within 5 tiles that damages and immobilizes units that walk over it.Upgraded: Set a trap on any tile that damages and immobilizes units that walk over it.

translation.ru_description: Поставьте капкан (радиус 5). Урон и Обездвиживание наступившим.
translation.ru_upgraded_description: Поставьте капкан где угодно. Урон и Обездвиживание наступившим.
translation.en_description: Set a trap within 5 tiles that damages and immobilizes units that walk over it.
translation.en_upgraded_description: Set a trap on any tile that damages and immobilizes units that walk over it.

abilities.description: Shoot a projectile that bounces everything adjacent to it back 3 tiles.Upgraded: Shoot a projectile that bounces everything adjacent to it back 3 tiles. They take 5 damage if they collide with something.

translation.ru_description: Выстрел, отбрасывающий всех соседей снаряда на 3 клетки назад.
translation.ru_upgraded_description: Выстрел, отбрасывающий всех соседей снаряда. 5 урона при столкновении.
translation.en_description: Shoot a projectile that bounces everything adjacent to it back 3 tiles.
translation.en_upgraded_description: Shoot a projectile that bounces everything adjacent to it back 3 tiles. They take 5 damage if they collide with something.

abilities.description: Spawn a charmed Tom Tom.Upgraded: Spawn a charmed Tom Tom on any tile.

translation.ru_description: Призовите очарованного Том-Тома.
translation.ru_upgraded_description: Призовите очарованного Том-Тома на любую клетку.
translation.en_description: Spawn a charmed Tom Tom.
translation.en_upgraded_description: Spawn a charmed Tom Tom on any tile.

abilities.description: Destroy a body. Equip a piece of Cat Hide armor to an empty armor slot.Upgraded: Destroy a body. Create a big food pickup and equip a piece of Cat Hide armor to an empty armor slot.

translation.ru_description: Уничтожьте тело. Экипируйте Предмет из Кошачьей Шкуры в 1 из 3 пустых слотов брони.
translation.ru_upgraded_description: Уничтожьте тело. Создайте большую еду и экипируйте Кошачью Шкуру.
translation.en_description: Destroy a body. Equip a piece of Cat Hide armor to an empty armor slot.
translation.en_upgraded_description: Destroy a body. Create a big food pickup and equip a piece of Cat Hide armor to an empty armor slot.

abilities.description: Destroy a body. Equip a piece of Cat Hide armor to an empty armor slot.Upgraded: Destroy a body. Create a big food pickup and equip a piece of Cat Hide armor to an empty armor slot.

translation.ru_description: Уничтожьте тело. Экипируйте Предмет из Кошачьей Шкуры в 1 из 3 пустых слотов брони.
translation.ru_upgraded_description: Уничтожьте тело. Создайте большую еду и экипируйте Кошачью Шкуру.
translation.en_description: Destroy a body. Equip a piece of Cat Hide armor to an empty armor slot.
translation.en_upgraded_description: Destroy a body. Create a big food pickup and equip a piece of Cat Hide armor to an empty armor slot.

abilities.description: Collect an adjacent pickup and gain +1 Bonus Attack instead of its normal effects.Upgraded: Collect all pickups within two tiles of you. Gain +1 Bonus Attack for each pickup instead of their normal effects. (This spell costs 1 mana.)

translation.ru_description: Подберите соседний лут и получите +1 Бонусную Атаку вместо эффекта.
translation.ru_upgraded_description:
Подберите весь лут в радиусе 2. +1 Бонусная Атака за каждый предмет.
[s:.7](Цена: 1 мана.)[/s]
translation.en_description: Collect an adjacent pickup and gain +1 Bonus Attack instead of its normal effects.
translation.en_upgraded_description:
Collect all pickups within two tiles of you. Gain +1 Bonus Attack for each pickup instead of their normal effects.
[s:.7](This spell costs 1 mana.)[/s]

abilities.description: Collect an adjacent pickup and gain +1 Bonus Attack instead of its normal effects.Upgraded: Collect all pickups within two tiles of you. Gain +1 Bonus Attack for each pickup instead of their normal effects. (This spell costs 1 mana.)

translation.ru_description: Подберите соседний лут и получите +1 Бонусную Атаку вместо эффекта.
translation.ru_upgraded_description:
Подберите весь лут в радиусе 2. +1 Бонусная Атака за каждый предмет.
[s:.7](Цена: 1 мана.)[/s]
translation.en_description: Collect an adjacent pickup and gain +1 Bonus Attack instead of its normal effects.
translation.en_upgraded_description:
Collect all pickups within two tiles of you. Gain +1 Bonus Attack for each pickup instead of their normal effects.
[s:.7](This spell costs 1 mana.)[/s]

abilities.description: Give a unit +3 range and reach until the end of their next turn.Upgraded: Give a unit +20 range and reach until the end of their next turn.

translation.ru_description: Дайте юниту +3 к Дальности и Радиусе действия до конца его следующего хода.
translation.ru_upgraded_description: Дайте юниту +20 Дальности и Радиусе действия до конца его следующего хода.
translation.en_description: Give a unit +3 range and reach until the end of their next turn.
translation.en_upgraded_description: Give a unit +20 range and reach until the end of their next turn.

abilities.description: Spawn bear traps on each adjacent tile.Upgraded: Spawn bear traps on each tile exactly 2 tiles away.

translation.ru_description: Создайте капканы на всех соседних клетках.
translation.ru_upgraded_description: Создайте капканы на всех клетках в радиусе 2 (кольцом).
translation.en_description: Spawn bear traps on each adjacent tile.
translation.en_upgraded_description: Spawn bear traps on each tile exactly 2 tiles away.

abilities.description: Inflict Marked on a unit.Upgraded: Inflict Marked on a unit and all other units of the same type.

translation.ru_description: Наложите Метку на юнита.
translation.ru_upgraded_description: Наложите Метку на юнита и всех других того же типа.
translation.en_description: Inflict Marked on a unit.
translation.en_upgraded_description: Inflict Marked on a unit and all other units of the same type.

abilities.description: Inflict Marked 5 on a unit. RELOAD: Kill an enemy.Upgraded: Inflict Marked 5 on a unit. RELOAD: Kill an enemy. This spell starts reloaded.

translation.ru_description:
Наложите Метку 5 на юнита.
ПЕРЕЗАРЯДКА: Убейте врага.
translation.ru_upgraded_description:
Наложите Метку 5 на юнита.
ПЕРЕЗАРЯДКА: Убейте врага.
(Начинается заряженным).
translation.en_description:
Inflict Marked 5 on a unit. 
RELOAD: Kill an enemy.
translation.en_upgraded_description:
Inflict Marked 5 on a unit.
RELOAD: Kill an enemy.
This spell starts reloaded.

abilities.description: Inflict Charm on a unit. If it's an enemy, it takes an extra turn immediately.Upgraded: Inflict Charm on a unit. It takes an extra turn immediately.

translation.ru_description: Очаруйте юнита. Если это враг, он сразу делает дополнительный ход.
translation.ru_upgraded_description: Очаруйте юнита. Он сразу делает дополнительный ход.
translation.en_description: Inflict Charm on a unit. If it's an enemy, it takes an extra turn immediately.
translation.en_upgraded_description: Inflict Charm on a unit. It takes an extra turn immediately.

abilities.description: Give yourself or an adjacent unit +1 Poison Lace.Upgraded: Give yourself or any other unit +1 Poison Lace.

translation.ru_description: Дайте себе или соседу +1 Ядовитое Покрытие.
translation.ru_upgraded_description: Дайте себе или любому юниту +1 Ядовитое Покрытие.
translation.en_description: Give yourself or an adjacent unit +1 Poison Lace.
translation.en_upgraded_description: Give yourself or any other unit +1 Poison Lace.

abilities.description: Until next turn, allied cats gain a bonus ability that can let you shoot a tile of their choice. (Castable once per turn.) Upgraded: Until next turn, allied cats gain a bonus ability that can let you shoot a tile of their choice. (Castable once per turn. This spell costs 0 mana.)

translation.ru_description:
До след. хода союзные коты получают способность выстрелить в выбранную вами клетку.
[s:.7](Раз за ход.)[/s]
translation.ru_upgraded_description:
До след. хода союзные коты получают способность выстрелить в выбранную вами клетку.
[s:.7](Раз за ход. Бесплатно.)[/s]
translation.en_description:
Until next turn, allied cats gain a bonus ability that can let you shoot a tile of their choice.
[s:.7](Castable once per turn.)[/s]
translation.en_upgraded_description:
Until next turn, allied cats gain a bonus ability that can let you shoot a tile of their choice.
[s:.7](Castable once per turn. This spell costs 0 mana.)[/s]

abilities.description: Until next turn, allied cats gain a bonus ability that can let you shoot a tile of their choice. (Castable once per turn.) Upgraded: Until next turn, allied cats gain a bonus ability that can let you shoot a tile of their choice. (Castable once per turn. This spell costs 0 mana.)

Until next turn, allied cats gain a bonus ability that can let you shoot a tile of their choice.

translation.en_upgraded_description:
Until next turn, allied cats gain a bonus ability that can let you shoot a tile of their choice.
[s:.7](Castable once per turn. This spell costs 0 mana.)[/s]

abilities.description: The next time an enemy ends movement in your basic attack range, attack it.Upgraded: Until your next turn, whenever an enemy ends movement in your basic attack range, attack it.

translation.ru_description: Когда враг закончит движение в радиусе вашей атаки, атакуйте его (один раз).
translation.ru_upgraded_description: До вашего след. хода: всегда атакуйте врагов, заканчивающих движение в радиусе атаки.
translation.en_description: The next time an enemy ends movement in your basic attack range, attack it.
translation.en_upgraded_description: Until your next turn, whenever an enemy ends movement in your basic attack range, attack it.

abilities.description: Instructs your friend to shoot an adjacent tile! (Castable once per turn.)

translation.ru_description:
Приказывает другу выстрелить в соседнюю клетку!
[s:.7](Раз за ход.)[/s]
translation.en_description:
Instructs your friend to shoot an adjacent tile!
[s:.7](Castable once per turn.)[/s]

abilities.description: Spawn a maggot familiar.Upgraded: Spawn a maggot familiar.

translation.ru_description: Призовите опарыша-фамильяра.
translation.ru_upgraded_description: Призовите [img:champion] опарыша-фамильяра.
translation.en_description: Spawn a maggot familiar.
translation.en_upgraded_description: Spawn a [img:champion] maggot familiar.

abilities.description: Spawn a pooter familiar.Upgraded: Spawn 2 pooter familiars.

translation.ru_description: Призовите пердуна-фамильяра.
translation.ru_upgraded_description: Призовите 2 пердунов-фамильяров.
translation.en_description: Spawn a pooter familiar.
translation.en_upgraded_description: Spawn 2 pooter familiars.

abilities.description: End your turn. On your next turn, your ranged abilities deal double damage. (Castable only if you haven't taken any other actions this turn.) Upgraded: End your turn. On your next turn, your ranged abilities deal double damage. (Costs 0 mana. Castable only if you haven't taken any other actions this turn other than your movement action.)

translation.ru_description:
Завершите ход. В следующем ходу ваши дальние атаки наносят двойной урон.
[s:.7](Можно, только если вы ничего не делали в этот ход.)[/s]
translation.ru_upgraded_description:
Завершите ход. В следующем ходу ваши дальние атаки наносят двойной урон.
[s:.7](Бесплатно. Можно, если вы только двигались в этот ход.)[/s]
translation.en_description:
End your turn. On your next turn, your ranged abilities deal double damage.
[s:.7](Castable only if you haven't taken any other actions this turn.)[/s]
translation.en_upgraded_description:
End your turn. On your next turn, your ranged abilities deal double damage.
[s:.7](Costs 0 mana. Castable only if you haven't taken any other actions this turn other than your movement action.)[/s]

abilities.description: Spawn brambles on any tile.Upgraded: Spawn brambles in an area.

translation.ru_description: Создайте терновник на любой клетке.
translation.ru_upgraded_description: Создайте терновник в области.
translation.en_description: Spawn brambles on any tile.
translation.en_upgraded_description: Spawn brambles in an area.

abilities.description: Teleport up to 5 tiles away. Set a bear trap on the tile you teleported from.Upgraded: Teleport up to 5 tiles away. Set a baited bear trap on the tile you teleported from.

translation.ru_description: Телепорт до 5 клеток. Ставит капкан там, откуда вы исчезли.
translation.ru_upgraded_description: Телепорт до 5 клеток. Ставит капкан с приманкой там, откуда вы исчезли.
translation.en_description: Teleport up to 5 tiles away. Set a bear trap on the tile you teleported from.
translation.en_upgraded_description: Teleport up to 5 tiles away. Set a baited bear trap on the tile you teleported from.

abilities.description: Teleport to any grass or water tile.Upgraded: Teleport to any grass or water tile. Gain Stealth.

translation.ru_description: Телепортируйтесь на любую траву или воду.
translation.ru_upgraded_description: Телепортируйтесь на любую траву или воду. Получите Скрытность.
translation.en_description: Teleport to any grass or water tile.
translation.en_upgraded_description: Teleport to any grass or water tile. Gain Stealth.

abilities.description: Set a trap that webs non-bug units that walk through it.Upgraded: Set a web trap on any tile that webs non-bug units that walk through it.

translation.ru_description: Поставьте ловушку, которая пленит не-жуков.
translation.ru_upgraded_description: Поставьте паутину где угодно. Пленит не-жуков.
translation.en_description: Set a trap that webs non-bug units that walk through it.
translation.en_upgraded_description: Set a web trap on any tile that webs non-bug units that walk through it.
